---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement for Focus Agent
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem Statement

What problem would this solve for you or your team?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the shape of the solution you have in mind.

## Scope

Which areas would this affect?

- API
- runtime / graph behavior
- branching
- streaming protocol
- web UI
- frontend SDK
- docs
- developer experience

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, sketches, references, or links if helpful.
